=== single_label
# Layout returns a single label node; the widget framework renders it.
mode: layout
width: 24
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "label",
            text: "Hello from layout",
            align: "left"
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║Hello from layout     ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== panel_with_label
# Layout returns a vbox panel containing a label.
mode: layout
width: 24
height: 5
--- js
var Game = {
    contract: 2,
    init: function(ctx) { return {}; },
    layout: function(playerID, w, h) {
        return {
            type: "vbox",
            children: [
                { type: "label", text: "Top label" },
                { type: "label", text: "Bottom label" }
            ]
        };
    }
};
---
===
╔══════════════════════╗
║                      ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝
